user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view candidates at the Offer Letter stage with full candidate details, so that I can generate offer letters for approved candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Letter screen; When the list loads; Then candidates in the offer-release stage are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can locate a specific candidate needing an offer letter
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Letter screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the offer letter list, so that I see the latest candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Letter screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate hiring stage filters, so that I can move between pipeline stages from the Offer Letter view
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Letter screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count
